raw.official description: After hitting an enemy with Primary Fire, gain 20% attack speed for 1.5 seconds.
raw.ability details: * Attack speed does not stack. Subsequent hits refresh the duration.

abilities.name: Scatter Arrows

raw.official description: On first ricochet, Storm Arrows split into 5 shots dealing 33% damage and bounce 1 extra time.
raw.ability details:
* Damage per second: 500 (w/ all 5 arrows hit)
* Once split, Storm Arrows lose the ability to [[critical hit]].
* Before splitting, Storm Arrows function as usual, dealing full damage and are able to critical hit.

raw.official description: Sonic Arrow hacks nearby Health Packs for 30 seconds.
raw.ability details: * Similarly to [[Sombra]]'s [[File:Ability Sombra Hack.png|sub|link=Sombra#Hack|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Hack|Hack]], hacked health packs respawn four times faster, can be seen through walls, cannot be used by the enemy and do not grant Hanzo ultimate charge upon healing a teammate.

raw.official description: Arrow hits reduce the cooldown of Lunge by up to 1 second, based on charge.
Wall Climb accelerates your Lunge cooldown by 300%.

abilities.name: Sonic Arrow
shot_type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type:
[[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Reveals enemies for a short time upon impact.
raw.ability details:
* Pressing the ability key turns the next arrow from [[Storm Bow]] or [[Storm Arrows]] into a Sonic Arrow. This does not change the speed, damage or projectile radius of the arrow. Pressing the key again before firing changes it back.
** Being hit by crowd control or releasing the draw does not change the arrow back.
* The cooldown starts when the arrow is fired.
* If the arrow becomes stuck on a moving target (e.g. an enemy hero), the effect follows.
** If the target becomes invalid (e.g. destroyed, retracted, cleansed), the arrow will fall off and continue its effects in its current location.
* A visual effect indicating the scan area is shown to enemies when Sonic Arrow lands.
* Enemies can hear a sound while near an attached Sonic Arrow.

abilities.name: Scatter Arrow

raw.official description: Hanzo shoots a fragmenting arrow that ricochets off walls and objects and can strike multiple targets at once.
raw.damage:
Initial shot: See [[Hanzo#Storm Bow|Storm Bow]]
Scattered: *Fully charged: 75 per arrow *Uncharged: 22 per arrow
raw.ability details: * Replaced by [[File:Ability-hanzo03.png|sub|link=Hanzo#Storm Arrows|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Hanzo#Storm Arrows|Storm Arrows]] in the [[May 3, 2018 Patch]]. *The projectile will scatter if it directly hits an enemy.

raw.official description: The next 5 arrows ricochet and fire instantly at reduced damage.
raw.fire rate: 4 shots/s
raw.ability details: * Damage per second: ~300 while firing * Cooldown starts when the ability ends. * Can be manually cancelled by pressing the ability key again. * Each arrow from Storm Arrows will bounce off a surface once. ** If a [[File:Ability-hanzo2.png|sub|link=Hanzo#Sonic Arrow|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Hanzo#Sonic Arrow|Sonic Arrow]] is fired while Storm Arrows is active, it will stick to a surface only after it has bounced once. * The enemy cannot interrupt the ability with [[crowd control]], such as a stun or sleep.

fire_rate.raw: 4 shots/s

raw.range distance: 7.85 meters

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Jump at walls to climb up them.
raw.ability details:
* Wall Climb ends when the player stops holding the button, the wall ends or the duration is up. It cannot then be used again until the player has landed on a walkable surface.
* Hanzo will grab and mantle ledges if the input is held while facing a ledge of a walkable surface.
** This does not count as starting Wall Climb, and can be done even if Wall Climb was already used.
** Destroys fences and other breakables in the way when mantling a ledge.
* Can reach up to 8.8m height (10m with Lunge) due to momentum being kept after Wall Climb ends.

abilities.name: Storm Bow

raw.shot type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
raw.official description: Hold to charge then release to launch arrows further.
raw.fire rate:
0.82 shots/s (max charge)
2 shots/s (min charge)
raw.dps: 102.46 at full charge, 50 at min charge
raw.ability details:
* Damage per second: 102.46 at full charge, 50 at min charge
* Fire recovery stops while using melee.
* The arrow can deal damage no earlier than 0.032 second after being launched.
* Takes 0.72 seconds to reach maximum draw. Draw can be held indefinitely.
* The minimum draw time required to kill a full [[health]] target (without [[armor]]) with a single [[headshot]]:
** 150 HP = ~0.43 seconds.
** 175 HP = ~0.50 seconds
** 200 HP = ~0.58 seconds.
** 225 HP = ~0.65 seconds.
** 250 HP = 0.72 seconds.
* The draw progress is preserved while wall climbing.
* Hanzo can undraw with Reload or Secondary Fire.
* An arrow takes ~6 seconds to land when fired straight up with minimum charge.

abilities.name: Dragonstrike
shot_type: [[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile (initial arrow) [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect (dragons)

[[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile (initial arrow)
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect (dragons)
raw.official description: Launch a deadly Dragon Spirit that devastates enemies it passes through.
raw.damage:
125 (initial arrow)
200 per second (outer)
400 per second (inner)
raw.cast time: 0.94 + 0 seconds
raw.ability details: * Hanzo can gain ultimate charge while Dragonstrike is active, but the damage dealt by it does not generate any charge. * The initial arrow can headshot with the default 2x multiplier. * The initial arrow and the AoE both pierce enemies, [[barrier]]s and other [[objects]], and both cannot be blocked by walls. ** Also damages the barriers and objects it passes through. * The initial arrow can be destroyed by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]] before turning into AoE. * The initial arrow is affected by [[damage amplification]] and [[armor]], but the AoE is not. * The hitbox is actually ''both'' dragons, meaning the ultimate deals less damage at the edges, and combined at the center.'"`UNIQ--ref-00000086-QINU`"' * If shot directly and the target is still, it takes approximately 2.6 seconds for the dragons to pass through them. Over this time, it can deal up to 1050 damage against a stationary target in the middle. * Does not drain nor interrupt Storm Arrows.
